action_text: Select "Short description" as the field in the filter condition dropdown
rationale: We need to build the required filter; first choose the field “Short description” in the filter builder so the operator and value inputs become enabled.

action_text: Set the list Search field selector to "Short description"
rationale: As an alternate, use the list’s quick search by setting its field selector to “Short description,” enabling a direct search for the target text.

action_text: Show the column search row beneath the table headers
rationale: Revealing the column search row allows filtering directly under the “Short description” column, another path to apply the needed contains filter.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-1f711cdf-2" into the list Search box
rationale: Prepare to run a quick search by entering the target string; after setting the field to “Short description,” pressing Enter will filter results.

action_text: Open the "Short description" column options menu
rationale: Opening the Short description column options may provide built-in filtering actions (e.g., filter/show matching), offering another route to the desired filter.
